diagrams.title: AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning Hierarchy
diagrams.description: A concentric circle diagram showing the relationship between Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. Deep Learning is shown as a subset of Machine Learning, which is a subset of AI. This helps learners understand where deep learning fits in the broader AI landscape.
elements: Arrows or containment lines showing subset relationship
Example text under each: AI - systems that simulate human intelligence, ML - systems that learn from data, DL - neural networks with multiple layers
diagrams.purpose: Explain the hierarchical relationship between AI, ML, and Deep Learning concepts

diagrams.title: Basic Machine Learning Workflow
diagrams.description: A horizontal flow diagram showing the standard machine learning pipeline from data input to prediction output. This visualizes the end-to-end process that every ML project follows.
elements: Arrow connectors between each box showing flow direction
Optional feedback loop arrow from prediction back to model
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate the step-by-step workflow of machine learning projects

diagrams.title: Simple Neural Network Architecture
diagrams.description: A diagram of a basic feedforward neural network showing the input layer, one hidden layer, and output layer with connected nodes. This introduces the fundamental structure of deep learning models.
elements: Input layer with 3 nodes (features: x1, x2, x3)
Output layer with 2 nodes (classification: y1, y2)
Connecting lines between layers representing weights
Bias terms shown at each layer
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the basic structure of a neural network for deep learning understanding
